channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Deck Officers
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Chief Officer position is available on a General Cargo Ship. The contract duration is 6 months +/- 1, with a salary of $7200. Joining is scheduled for August 6, 2026. Requirements include good English and experience on similar vessel types. Stable sea service within the same shipowner/shipmanager is required. The vessel was built in 2010 and has a DWT of 9347.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chief Officer Job on General Cargo Ship at Chesva Enterprises Limited Group of Companies

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Chief Officer position is available on a multipurpose vessel. The contract duration is 2 months, with a salary of EUR 5247-5403 per month, subject to owner's approval. A good command of English and a Schengen visa are required. Joining date is July 19, 2026.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chief Officer Vacancy on Multipurpose Vessel EUR 5247-5403 at Nordvegr Ltd

item.description:
Location: Europe
Description:

A Master position is available on a CTV vessel in Europe. The contract is temporary, with a joining date of July 21, 2026, and a duration of 3 weeks. Specific requirements for this role are not detailed.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Master Vacancy on CTV Vessel at ORCA Crew Services

item.description:
Location: Russia
Description:
Vladivostok · Container (1,022 TEU) · 5 months · Russian crew · August/September joining
We are looking for a 3rd Officer for m/v TRANSIT MILLIONKA (2007, Russian flag, B&W 6S50MC-C main engine, 9480 kW). The vessel operates on the Vladivostok – China – South Korea route. Contract duration is 5 months with Russian-speaking crew (17 persons). Joining at the end of August / beginning of September in Vladivostok. Salary: 184,000 RUB net per month + performance bonus of 50 USD/month (paid in RUB at the end of contract based on performance). Holiday pay upon dismissal (approx. 110,000 RUB for 5 months) is included. Official employment under Russian labour law, medical examination paid by employer, and preferential pension contribution are provided.
Key responsibilities:
- Navigational watchkeeping and bridge duties
– Assisting in cargo operations
– Maintenance of life-saving and fire-fighting equipment
– Updating charts and publications
– Following safety and environmental regulations
Essential requirements:
- Valid 3rd Officer COC
– Relevant experience on container vessels
– Good command of English
– All valid STCW certificates and medical
What we offer:
- Competitive net salary + performance bonus
– Official employment with full social benefits
– Preferential pension contribution
– Employer-paid medical examination


Apply to this job
item.title: [Job] 3rd Officer – Container Vessel at Transit

item.description:
Location: Squamish, British Columbia
Description:

A Chief Officer/Chief Mate position is available on a passenger transfer vessel. Responsibilities include assisting the Master with safe passages, vessel maintenance, and ensuring compliance with regulations. The role requires a Chief Mate 500T COC, relevant experience, and specific MED and first aid certifications. The position is based in Squamish, British Columbia, with a daily salary of $560.00 and a full-time/rotational contract.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chief Officer Job on Passenger Transfer Vessel at Bridgemans Services Group LP (BSG)

item.description:
Location: Howe Sound, BC
Description:

A Captain with a 500T Master Domestic certificate is needed for passenger transfers in Howe Sound, BC. This full-time, rotational contract role involves ensuring the safe transfer of personnel and emergency response. Responsibilities include operating the vessel safely, managing crew, and maintaining compliance with Transport Canada regulations. Prior experience as a Captain 500T is required.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Captain 500T Job on Passenger Transfer Vessel at Bridgemans Services Group LP (BSG)

item.description:
Location: Squamish, British Columbia
Description:

A Captain (150T Master) is sought for a passenger transfers vessel operating in Howe Sound, BC. Responsibilities include ensuring safe vessel operation, personnel transfer, and emergency response in compliance with Transport Canada regulations. The role involves daily reporting, vessel maintenance oversight, and crew management. A valid Transport Canada 150T Certificate of Competency and Seafarers Medical certificate are required. This is a full-time, rotational contract position with a salary of $650 per day.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Captain (150T Master) Job on Passenger Vessel $650 per day at Bridgemans Services Group LP (BSG)

item.description:
Location: Summer Isles, Scotland
Description:

A Commercial Skipper is sought for a unique restoration and regeneration charity operating on Tanera Mòr in the Summer Isles, Scotland. This year-round role involves passenger transport, cargo movements, and logistics support. Essential qualifications include RYA Advanced Powerboat/OOW, Commercial Endorsement, ML5/ENG1, and relevant safety certifications. Experience in exposed coastal waters is required. A 10 on / 4 off shift pattern may be considered, with potential accommodation available. Commutable to Badentarbat Bay is necessary.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Commercial Skipper Job - Summer Isles, Scotland at Clyde Marine Recruitment

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A 3rd Officer is sought for a RoRo vessel. Embarkation is scheduled for August 1, 2026, with a contract duration of approximately 4 weeks. Candidates with prior experience on RoRo ships are encouraged to apply. Further details are available upon request.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] 3rd Officer Vacancy on RoRo Vessel at Lowland International

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A General Cargo vessel under 3000 GT requires a 1st Officer/Maritime Officer. The position is available from August 15 for a contract duration of 8 to 10 weeks. Candidates should be available for this role.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] 1st Officer Vacancy on General Cargo Ship at Lowland International
